message:
🐛 Fix SSE cache leak, Fiber context recycling, and goroutine leak (#2624)

* 🐛 Fix SSE cache memory leak, Fiber context recycling, and goroutine leak

- Add periodic eviction goroutine (sync.Once + ticker) that sweeps
  expired SSE cache entries every 30s to prevent unbounded memory growth
- Delete expired entries on read in sseCacheGet() for immediate cleanup
- Replace c.Context() with context.Background() in all 28 background
  goroutines to prevent accessing Fiber's recycled request context
- Goroutines already have per-cluster timeouts that bound their lifetime

Fixes #2613
Fixes #2605
Fixes #2599

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix Fiber context recycling in custom_resources.go + gofmt alignment

Extends the c.Context() → context.Background() fix to custom_resources.go
which had the same recycled-context bug. Also fixes gofmt alignment in sse.go.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

-			ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(c.Context(), mcpDefaultTimeout)
+			ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), mcpDefaultTimeout)
 			defer cancel()
